title: Princewill Umeh Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Princewill Umeh Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Princewill Umeh
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’25
Arlington Campus
After working at J.P. Morgan, Princewill Umeh sought out the Align program to explore his entrepreneurial ambitions outside of finance. The supportive environment he’s found in Arlington has helped prepare him for co-ops in computer science — and for the business he plans to start one day.
Once I start applying for co-ops, I know that when I’m asked to do something in the job, I’m going to be confident [I can] do it because I gained the experience in the past three semesters
Princewill Umeh, MSCS ’25
Explore all Khoury Stories
